sentences.arabic: تُفَضِّلُ سَارَةُ الْعَمَلَ مِنْ مَنْزِلِهَا لِتَوْفِيرِ الْوَقْتِ وَالْجُهْدِ.
sentences.translation: Sara preferira rad od kuće kako bi uštedjela vrijeme i trud.
sentences.translationEn: Sara prefers working from home to save time and effort.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ يَوْمَهَا بِتَنْظِيمِ جَدْوَلِ الْمَهَامِّ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svoj dan započinje preciznim organizovanjem rasporeda dnevnih zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: She starts her day by organizing the daily tasks schedule accurately.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ الْحَاسُوبَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهَا عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Koristi računar za komunikaciju sa svojim kolegama putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: She uses the computer to communicate with her colleagues via the internet.

sentences.arabic: تُحَقِّقُ سَارَةُ نَتَائِجَ مُمْتَازَةً بِفَضْلِ تَرْكِيزِهَا الْعَالِي.
sentences.translation: Sara postiže odlične rezultate zahvaljujući svom visokom fokusu.
sentences.translationEn: Sara achieves excellent results thanks to her high focus.
